---
title: "The Rev. Canon John Gylby Lonsdale"
---

## The Rev. Canon John Gylby Lonsdale

**Dates:** (1818-1907)

### Description

father of Margaret Lonsdale, secretary of the National Society 1848-1860

### Biography

Son of the Bishop of Lichfield, he served as his father’s chaplain and became a canon of Lichfield in 1855.

### Letters

- Letter from Nov 3d 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
